_comment: JPL Horizons barycentric (SSB, @0) equatorial-frame (refplane='earth', = layup BCART_EQ) state of TNO 2000 FV53, captured 2026-06-20 via astroquery Horizons(id='2000 FV53', location='@0', epochs=<epoch_jd_tdb>, id_type='smallbody').vectors(refplane='earth'). Epoch is what layup selects fitting the 2000 FV53 subset of tests/data/bernstein_2004_kbos_data_with_sats_occ.csv (28 obs incl. 1 HST/space-based); regenerate if that data or layup's epoch logic changes.
